_comment: Template for the spendguard SaaS/team roll-up connection. Copy to ~/.spendguard/saas.json (gitignored) and fill in once the SEPARATE server repo (llmspendguard.com) is running. Until then keep enabled=false — every client call degrades gracefully. The api_key is the ONE identity: the SERVER maps it to your user/team/org, so the client stores no team_id/org_id. Secrets NEVER go in the repo; use this file or the SPENDGUARD_SAAS_KEY env var. See src/spendguard/saas.py for the HTTP contract.
